title: stachys boveana
intro: Stachys boveana, also known as Catmint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Stachys boveana include reducing anxiety and insomnia, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Stachys boveana is often used as a dried herb or infused in teas, essential oils, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
